violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. FMC was absent; per PIC no other employees have food safety manger certification at this time. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026

The door #13 to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
The following were observed in poor repair: -dish machine (leaking) -soap dispenser for 3-bay sink (falling off wall). New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2026
Per PIC, a metal bar came off the dish machine. Inspector observed bar; dish machine was observed functioning at the time of this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
A ceiling tile was observed missing in the hallway leading to office and dry storage. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025

The door #13 to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
A ceiling tile is missing in the hall/office area. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2024

The door #13 to the outside, located in the dining area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the gaskets on the small milk cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Trash and debris was observed in the dumpster area. Refuse areas must be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
Several ceiling tiles in the hall/office area near dry storage are missing/open. New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the milk cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/18/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of trash, litter and debris. An area for refuse, returnables, and recyclables must be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024
Bag of rice was observed with gnaw marks. Food was voluntarily disposed of by the PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in store room and adulterated food. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Cans of food were observed stored on the floor in the storeroom. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
Rodent droppings were observed on the exterior of boxes. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Refuse area was observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, leaf litter, and debris. An area for refuse, returnables, and recyclables must be maintained clean and free of litter to prevent harborage conditions for pests. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2024

The floors under shelving in the stock room and area by the back door have an accumulation of soil residue and rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Equipment was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings throughout dry storage room. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/21/2024
Single service items were observed in direct contact with rodent droppings. Single service items were voluntarily disposed by the PIC. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024

The door to the outside, located in the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/01/2023

Sink and Surface sanitizer solution was observed at 1130 DDBSA parts per million (ppm). Sink and Surface solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Chemical was adjusted to correct concentration at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2023

The door to the outside, located in the back door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/12/2023
